channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: For Dominican baseball hopefuls, age fraud cases and a curveball from Japan reflect a broken system
item.description: BANÍ, Dominican Republic (AP) — There was little sleep in the days leading up to Jan. 15. Dozens of teenage baseball players across the Dominican Republic lay in bed, unable to close their eyes.
item.dc:creator: DÁNICA COTO and MARTÍN ADAMES ALCÁNTARA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Towns, Brunson help Knicks edge Bulls 113-111 in OT
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Karl-Anthony Towns had 32 points and 18 rebounds, Jalen Brunson added 22 points and 12 assists and the New York Knicks edged the Chicago Bulls 113-111 in overtime Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Anthony Davis out at least 2 more weeks, but Mavs say he's making good progress with groin injury
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Anthony Davis will be sidelined at least two more weeks with the groin injury sustained in his Dallas debut, while the Mavericks said Thursday their star forward is making good progress in his recovery.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ex-Spain soccer boss Rubiales found guilty of sexual assault and fined for World Cup kiss
item.description: MADRID (AP) — Former Spanish soccer boss Luis Rubiales was found guilty Thursday of sexually assaulting player Jenni Hermoso for kissing her after the 2023 Women’s World Cup final, an incident that overshadowed Spain’s first world title in women’s soccer and sparked debate about sexism in the sport.
item.dc:creator: TALES AZZONI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dubai police detain man who caused Raducanu distress at Dubai tournament
item.description: DUBAI, United Arab Emirates (AP) — Dubai police detained a man who caused Emma Raducanu distress by exhibiting “ fixated behavior ” toward the British star at a tennis tournament.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: How Central Girls Wrestling reached the pinnacle of Colorado Wrestling
item.description:
Central Girls Wrestling, aka D51 Phoenix, featuring girls from all four D51 high schools, has done it.
They are the cream of the crop.
The top of the heap.
The best in the state.
They are the undisputed 5A State Champions.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: This rookie QB card could be worth $50K if you pull it from a new Topps set
item.description: Denver Broncos rookie quarterback Bo Nix impressed on the field, and now a Colorado sports card store is ready to pay $50,000 to keep a unique card featuring him close to home.
item.dc:creator: Spencer Kristensen, Fox 5

item.title: Suspects charged in connection to burglaries of several pro athletes
item.description: Seven Chilean nationals face federal charges related to the burglaries of several high profile athletes' homes.
item.dc:creator: Brian Dulle, WGN 9

item.title: Researchers confirm Hall of Famer Bobby Hull had CTE when he died 2 years ago
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Bobby Hull, the Hall of Fame forward and two-time NHL MVP who helped the Chicago Blackhawks win the Stanley Cup in 1961, had chronic traumatic encephalopathy when he died two years ago, his widow said in a statement released on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: BYU makes a statement, crushing Kansas, 91-57
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - In one of the biggest blowouts in the history of Kansas basketball, BYU made a big-time statement with a dominating 91-57 win over the Jayhawks Tuesday night at the Marriott Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Right-hander Nick Pivetta, Padres finalize $55M four-year contract
item.description: Right-hander Nick Pivetta and the San Diego Padres officially announced a finalized $55 million, four-year contract on Monday, a backloaded deal that allows him to opt out after the 2026 and '27 seasons.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: College student Jaren Barajas beats Damian Lillard in 3-point shooting contest, wins $100K
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Jaren Barajas shoots on his backyard hoop maybe once a month these days. He's a busy 18-year-old college student now, so basketball has taken a backburner to academics.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: William Byron avoids late wrecks to win 2nd straight Daytona 500
item.description: Ninth in the No. 24 Chevrolet with one lap left, Byron was in the right place by racing near the outside wall in overtime to became the first back-to-back winner since Denny Hamlin in 2019-20.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC
